offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual data entry causes reporting delays. We provide consolidated payroll reports instead of manual reconciliation.
problem: Difficulty in consolidating payroll data from multiple providers for accurate reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try Monthly report generation and Data import on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
